candidates.title: Editor de video para podcast bilingüe (español/inglés) – Dinero Dream USA / Video Editor for Bilingual Podcast
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro · Animate — for layered/retouched assets and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: NOTA: El podcast es en español, el editor debe hablar español como primer o segundo idioma ESPAÑOL Tengo un podcast de educación financiera enfocado en hipotecas, bienes raíces y el Sueño Americano para la comunidad Latina. Busco un editor de video confiable para colaboración recurrente. Puedes ver nuestro podcast aquí: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCEt9Kvb-czp-BGjcaRBx1JQ — esto te da una idea de nuestro estilo, ritmo y la calidad que buscamos. Por favor menciona algo específico de nuestro podcast en tu propuesta para saber que lo viste. Importante – intro y outro existentes: Ya tenemos un intro y un outro, pero queremos rediseñar la imagen y las fotos que aparecen en ellos. Queremos que se vean profesionales, atractivos, llamativos y lujosos — con un acabado premium de alta gama. Adjunto encontrarás nuestro intro y outro actuales para que veas exactamente lo que tenemos hoy. Setup d

candidates.title: 3D Character Animation with Sound
candidates.tools: After Effects · Animate — for video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I’m putting together a fully voiced 3-dimensional character animation and need a specialist who can take the project from rigging through final sound-synced render. The style is pure 3D Animation and the focus is on expressive Character Animation—product or architectural elements involved. You will receive a detailed storyboard, script, and reference materials once we begin our chat. The goal is a polished video that feels lively, tells the story clearly, and arrives ready for immediate use with music, effects, and dialogue mixed down. Deliverables • Model and rig of all characters (if new assets are required) • Final animated video in 4K and 1080p, complete with mastered audio • Source files (scene, textures, rig, and audio stems) for future tweaks Acceptance criteria will be straightforward: smooth, believable motion; lip-sync on point; clean renders free of noise; and balanced audio t

candidates.title: Polish Three Podcast Episodes
candidates.tools: Premiere Pro — for scalable vector artwork and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I have three interview-style podcast recordings that now sit as 30-minute raw video files with the external audio captured separately. I need each one shaped into a tight 15–20 minute episode that looks and sounds ready for immediate release on YouTube and the usual podcast platforms. Here is what I’m after: trim the conversations so they flow, sync and splice the clean mic track, remove any obvious stumbles or long pauses, add gentle noise reduction and mastering, then colour-grade the footage so every shot matches smoothly. Because I don’t yet have background music picked out, I’d like you to suggest a short professional, neutral bed that can sit quietly under the intro, mid-roll break (if you feel one is useful), and outro. Feel free to use tasteful transition effects or subtle SFX where they help; if something stands out as unnecessary, leave it out—I trust your editorial judgement o

candidates.title: Tutorial Video Intro Motion Graphics
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for scalable vector artwork and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I have a raw tutorial video plus a separate voice track from the professor that needs to be married together and finished with a short, professional-and-clean intro animation. The goal is a polished learning asset that flows smoothly from branded opener to closing frame. Here’s what I need from you: • Design a 5-7 second intro animation in a professional, clean style (logo and colour palette supplied). • Sync and mix the professor’s audio track with the existing footage, balancing levels and removing background noise. • Trim minor hesitations and tidy transitions so the lesson feels seamless. • Deliver the final video in 1080p (MP4) along with the project files (Premiere Pro / After Effects or equivalent). Colour grading and light text call-outs are welcome if they help clarity, but the primary focus is that intro animation and the precise audio integration. If this sounds straightforwar

candidates.title: Adobe Premiere Pro Video Editor Needed for Entertainment Interviews and Social Clips
candidates.brief: I run an entertainment website where I interview actors, casting directors, and other industry professionals. I’m looking for a reliable video editor to help edit interview videos on an ongoing basis, roughly once a week. The interviews are usually recorded through Zoom, and I need someone who works in Adobe Premiere Pro**. I use Premiere, so I’d like to be able to easily share project files, make adjustments if needed, and keep the workflow consistent. I usually do these myself but I think getting someone to help out, it would free my time for other things. The main job would be taking the raw Zoom interview footage and turning it into a polished final video for YouTube and my website.
